title: sida glabra
intro: Sida glabra, also known as the smooth bala or hairy sida, is a plant species in the mallow family that is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Sida glabra include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in the management of diabetes and respiratory issues. Sida glabra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in folk medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
